summary: A historical overview of Saint Hildegard von Bingen's life and her pioneering contributions to medicine, particularly dermatology and holistic healing. The text highlights her belief in the interconnectedness of spiritual harmony and physical health, her advocacy for moderation, and her practical medical remedies.

principles.statement: Maintain a proper balance and moderation in all things.
principles.rationale: Imbalance in physical habits, such as overeating or overdrinking, disrupts the body and inflicts wounds upon the soul.
principles.source_quote: The soul loves moderation in all things. Whenever the human body lacks measure, and eat and drinks or something like that unbalances it, the powers of the soul are wounded. … So in all things let people maintain a proper balance

principles.statement: The moral qualities of a child are shaped by parental love.
principles.rationale: While physical traits like sex are determined by biological factors (the seed), the emotional and moral foundation of a child comes from the affection between the parents.
principles.source_quote: The strength of the male seed determines the sex of the embryo, while the love of one parent to the other determines the moral qualities of the child

principles.statement: Physical health is dependent on spiritual harmony.
principles.rationale: Health is a system of linked components; achieving harmony with God and universal continuity is a necessary prerequisite for internal spiritual and physical well-being.

mental_models.name: Cosmic Continuity (Holistic Healing)
mental_models.description: A system viewing the human being as a set of linked components in relationship to the world as a whole, where spiritual harmony dictates physical health.
mental_models.example: Treating internal diseases through external skin therapies like baths, rubbings, and saunas, recognizing the interconnectedness of the body's organs and the outside world.

mental_models.name: Abscess Color Prognosis
mental_models.description: Predicting the outcome and severity of an infection based on its visual presentation (color).
mental_models.example: Observing that a black abscess threatens the patient with death, whereas grayish or whitish ones indicate different outcomes, guiding the decision to drain them for better evolution.

heuristics: Treat scabies with sulfur ointment for at least five days.
Drain abscesses to promote better healing and evolution.
Take responsibility for your own health by enjoying a natural life and making proper use of your five senses.

signature_quotes.text: The soul loves moderation in all things. Whenever the human body lacks measure, and eat and drinks or something like that unbalances it, the powers of the soul are wounded. … So in all things let people maintain a proper balance
signature_quotes.context: Writing on the importance of moderation for holistic health in 'Causae et curae'.

signature_quotes.text: The strength of the male seed determines the sex of the embryo, while the love of one parent to the other determines the moral qualities of the child
signature_quotes.context: Describing the psychological and biological factors in embryo development.

signature_quotes.text: when (a person) is in transition giving one thing up and beginning another, the soul naturally senses this change and is disgusted … it acts as if it would leave the body, just as it does in leaving a dying body
signature_quotes.context: Reflecting on the emotional toll of life transitions, likely based on her own move from Disibodenberg.

signature_quotes.text: Divine justice shall have its hours… the judgments of God are about to be accomplished; the Empire and the Papacy, sunk into impiety, shall crumble way together….
signature_quotes.context: Criticizing the wealth and corruption of the Church and Empire during her time.

anti_patterns.description: Lacking measure or overindulging in food and drink.
anti_patterns.why_it_fails: It unbalances the human body and wounds the powers of the soul, disrupting holistic health.

anti_patterns.description: Institutional wealth and corruption within the Church and Empire.
anti_patterns.why_it_fails: It sinks the institutions into impiety, inviting divine justice that will cause them to crumble and be replaced by a regenerated world.
